overview.value: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries (MHI) Group describes itself as one of the world's leading industrial groups, spanning energy, logistics and infrastructure, industrial machinery, and aerospace and defense. The company works with clients and partners around the globe. MHI describes its purpose as passionately seeking new, simpler and sustainable ways to create a better future for everyone who shares the planet.

focus.value: A global industrial group spanning energy, logistics and infrastructure, industrial machinery, aerospace and defense

events.headline: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries launches as a unified company
Mitsubishi Heavy Industries splits into three regional companies under zaibatsu dissolution
The three successor companies reconsolidate as Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Ltd.
MHI takes over production and management of the H-IIA rocket from JAXA
MHI and Arianespace agree to jointly offer satellite launch services
MHI agrees with JAXA to begin its own launch service business using H-IIB rockets
MHI selected by JAXA as prime contractor for Japan's new flagship launch vehicle, later named H3
MHI receives KhalifaSat launch order from EIAST of the UAE, its third overseas satellite launch contract
MHI completes production of the final H-IIA core stage ahead of the rocket's retirement
